scenes.summary: Elias, a retired watchmaker, races against the final seconds before midnight to repair his late wife's cherished pocket watch. A momentary error causes his hands to tremble, but he overcomes his grief and fear to complete the delicate repair just as the New Year begins, finding a quiet, hopeful connection.

character_wardrobe_notes.wardrobe: A well-worn, long-sleeved shirt with a practical, slightly stained apron over it. His spectacles are perched on his nose.

must_keep_scene_facts: Elias is repairing his late wife's watch.
It is New Year's Eve, just before midnight.

blocks.text: CLOSE ON a vintage POCKET WATCH, its delicate mechanisms exposed under a bright desk lamp. ELIAS THORNE (80s, frail but focused), a magnifying loupe fixed to his eye, hovers over it with a pair of tiny tweezers. A digital clock on the workbench blares 00:00:10. TEN SECONDS TO MIDNIGHT.
His breath hitches. This isn't just any repair; it's HERS. His late wife's watch, meant to chime the New Year.
His hand, usually steady as stone, TREMBLES. A microscopic gear SLIPS from the tweezers, bouncing on the workbench, rolling precariously close to the edge. His eyes widen in panic.
The digital clock clicks: 00:00:05. Elias forces a deep, shaky breath, eyes darting to a framed photo of his smiling wife on the bench. Her gentle gaze seems to steady him.
With renewed precision, he snatches the rogue gear. His fingers, now firm, guide it back into place. He delicately closes the watch casing.
The digital clock hits 00:00:01. He holds the watch to his ear, a hopeful grimace on his face.

00:00:00. A soft, distinct TICK emanates from the watch. Simultaneously, a burst of FIREWORKS EXPLODES outside the window, painting the night sky in vibrant colors. Elias lets out a long, slow breath, a faint, peaceful smile gracing his lips. He clutches the ticking watch to his chest, looking towards the window, a quiet moment of connection found.

scene_end.turn: Elias overcomes his trembling hands and successfully repairs the watch at the last second, signifying a hopeful new beginning.
scene_end.emotional_shift: From tense grief and panic to profound peace and a sense of enduring connection.
